achievements: Component architecture refactor: 23 loose files moved into 11 domain subfolders (task-panel, task-list, modals, project, layout, sidebar, settings, task-edit, kanban, backgrounds, sessions-calendar) — all with index.tsx barrels and named exports
Theming: 6 new themes added (Dracula, Gruvbox, Solarized, Rose Pine, Midnight, Everforest)
Animated backgrounds: 5 backgrounds (Aurora, Plasma, SoftAurora, PixelSnow, PixelBlast) integrated with theme-adaptive colors via useThemeColors hook
Token system: replaced hardcoded zinc/white/border values with app-* tokens across kanban, activity, project, sessions pages
Sessions UX: GhostBlockDialog + TaskPickerDialog created; draft ghost block feature added
Appearance settings page redesigned: compact wrapper, better typography, theme swatches with dot indicator, background tiles
improvements: SessionsCalendar.tsx (~5052 tok) has complex pointer/drag logic — consider extracting useDragSession hook to reduce component size
useAppStore.ts (~5887 tok) mixes domain reducers with UI state — consider splitting into slices once store grows further
BackgroundLayer renders WebGL canvases unconditionally — add early return when backgroundId is 'none' to skip GPU work
GhostBlockDialog/TaskPickerDialog live in pages/sessions/ but follow component patterns — consider moving to components/sessions-calendar/ for consistency
UI_SCALE_OPTIONS duplicated in 4 files (main, preload, preload.d.ts, types/index.ts) — single source of truth would reduce sync risk
next_tasks: Persistence: backgroundId not yet in AppState — needs types/index.ts, main isAppState, preload bridge, and store persist-diff (follow 'adding a persistent field' checklist in CLAUDE.md)
Sessions: session blocks likely need CRUD persistence path — verify SessionCreateInput/SessionUpdateInput flow from store to main IPC
Today/Inbox pages: verify theme token coverage matches what was done for kanban/activity/project pages
ActivityPage: buildEvents only uses useMemo — check if date grouping is reactive to tasks changing correctly
Run full typecheck (npm run typecheck) after the large refactor to confirm zero regressions
risks: backgroundId persistence gap: if backgroundId is stored only in React state (not electron-store), users lose their background on restart
Duplicate UI_SCALE_OPTIONS: any new scale added to one file but missed in others causes silent runtime mismatch
Task.status + Task.completed sync invariant: any new code path that updates status without updating completed (or vice versa) will silently corrupt state — no runtime guard exists
WebGL backgrounds on Wayland: Plasma/Aurora use WebGL; the existing WaylandColorManagement* workaround in main is for window rendering, not canvas — GPU fallback behavior untested on Wayland
pages/sessions/ vs components/sessions-calendar/ split: two files (GhostBlockDialog, TaskPickerDialog) are in pages/ not components/ — inconsistency will grow if not resolved
